_publications._publicationTitle: Perspectives of Patients and Providers on Chronic Pain Assessment in Neurofibromatosis Type 1 (NF1): A Qualitative Study.

_contextSnippet: those with moderate to severe depression or severe anxiety (i.e., scores of >15 on either measure) were excluded. The mean score for depression on the PHQ was 12.1 (SD, 2.3; range, 0 - 14)
details: Mean depression score was 12.1 (SD 2.3, range 0-14) used for excluding participants with moderate to severe depression (scores >15)
